topic: You do not need to pay a consultant to start: build your feasibility study free, then apply at db.om
format: Map the 10 Development Bank Oman / Riyada programs to who qualifies for each — close with how to generate the matching study
post:
A friend in Muscat spent 3 months "getting ready" to apply for a Riyada grant.

No consultant. No study. Just fear that he'd do it wrong.

He finally submitted — and got funded. The study took him one afternoon.

Most people never see this full picture of what's available:

→ **Young Entrepreneur Program** — under 35, new business idea
→ **Women's Entrepreneurship** — female-led SMEs
→ **Manufacturing & Industry** — product-based businesses
→ **Agriculture & Fisheries** — food production, fishing
→ **Tourism & Heritage** — hospitality, cultural projects
→ **Technology & Innovation** — tech startups, digital services
→ **Sanad Self-Employment** — individual freelancers and tradespeople
→ **SME Expansion Loan** — existing businesses scaling up
→ **Rural Development** — governorate-based projects outside Muscat
→ **Social Enterprise** — community-impact ventures

Most people qualify for at least two. Most never apply because they assume they need a paid consultant to write the feasibility study first.

You don't.

My friend thought the same thing. Three months of waiting, one afternoon of actual work.

Build a bank-ready feasibility study free in ~10 minutes — covers all 10 Development Bank Oman / Riyada programs: https://www.thesmartpro.io/feasibility-studio?utm_source=linkedin&utm_medium=social&utm_campaign=feasibility

Which program are you targeting — or did you not know you qualified until now?
